title: eurya brassii
intro: Eurya brassii is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphyllaceae, native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Eurya brassii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
